'''thadhuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iberdomide|iberdomide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iberdomide|iberdomide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thadhuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thædhivith|thædhivith]] || [[word:thædhivij|thædhivij]] || [[word:thædhivish|thædhivish]] || [[word:thædhivi|thædhivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadhudhuvuth|thadhudhuvuth]] || [[word:thadhudhuvuj|thadhudhuvuj]] || [[word:thadhudhuvush|thadhudhuvush]] || [[word:thadhudhuvu|thadhudhuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhuvuth|thadhuvuth]] || [[word:thadhuvuj|thadhuvuj]] || [[word:thadhuvush|thadhuvush]] || [[word:thadhuvu|thadhuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhufvuth|thadhufvuth]] || [[word:thadhufvuj|thadhufvuj]] || [[word:thadhufvush|thadhufvush]] || [[word:thadhufvuf|thadhufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thadhuvuthu|thadhuvuthu]] || [[word:thadhuvuju|thadhuvuju]] || [[word:thadhuvushu|thadhuvushu]] || [[word:thadhuvuku|thadhuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thadhuvuth|thadhuvuth]] || [[word:thadhuvuj|thadhuvuj]] || [[word:thadhuvush|thadhuvush]] || [[word:thadhuvu|thadhuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thadhuvuthul|thadhuvuthul]] || [[word:thadhuvujul|thadhuvujul]] || [[word:thadhuvushul|thadhuvushul]] || [[word:thadhuvukul|thadhuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thadhuvuthuthu|thadhuvuthuthu]] || [[word:thadhuvujuju|thadhuvujuju]] || [[word:thadhuvushushu|thadhuvushushu]] || [[word:thadhuvuku|thadhuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thadhuvuthun|thadhuvuthun]] || [[word:thadhuvujun|thadhuvujun]] || [[word:thadhuvushun|thadhuvushun]] || [[word:thadhuvukun|thadhuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thadhuvuthuoro|thadhuvuthuoro]] || [[word:thadhuvujuoro|thadhuvujuoro]] || [[word:thadhuvushuoro|thadhuvushuoro]] || [[word:thadhuvukuoro|thadhuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
